narrative:
New Philadelphia City Sd city school district has 13,634 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.2% D−R vs +0.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
